description: Create final evidence summary visualization for the report
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 8))

# Title
ax.text(0.5, 0.97, 'A0A804UIX9 Core Function Hypothesis: Evidence Summary',
        transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')

# Verdict box
verdict_box = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='green', linewidth=2)
ax.text(0.5, 0.88, 'VERDICT: SUPPORTED — GO:0003674 (molecular_function) is correct',
        transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold',
        bbox=verdict_box)

# Evidence categories
categories = [
    ('Database Evidence\n(Supports root MF)', [
        'PE=4 (predicted only)',
        'Annotation score 1.0 (lowest)',
        'PGG domain = DUF (unknown function)',
        'Zero PGG proteins have MF annotations',
        'Zero PDB structures for PGG domain',
        'Not in STRING database'
    ], '#E3F2FD', 'blue'),
    ('Family Context\n(Qualifies hypothesis)', [
        'ACD6: ion channel-like (PMID:37995686)',
        'ITN1: salt stress signaling (PMID:18643991)',
        'ACD6 family: growth-defense tradeoff',
        'Large plant family (~29,000 proteins)',
        '6-TM topology suggests channel/transport',
        'Conserved PGG repeat unit (3 TM per PGG)'
    ], '#FFF3E0', 'orange'),
    ('Key Barriers\n(Prevent specific MF)', [
        'Missing ankyrin repeats (all char. have)',
        'ACD6 Ank repeats = channel gating domain',
        'Paralog maps to different PANTHER family',
        'Closest rice ortholog: only 13.4% identity',
        'CASKIN label: cross-kingdom artifact',
        'No interaction or localization data'
    ], '#FFEBEE', 'red'),
    ('Gene Activity\n(Not pseudogene)', [
        'Expressed in 17 RNA-seq experiments',
        'Multiple maize tissues (B73/Mo17)',
        'AlphaFold pLDDT 88-94 for TM regions',
        'Chromosome 9 protein-coding gene',
        'Internal PGG duplication (40% identity)',
        'Highly basic C-terminal (+16 charge)'
    ], '#F3E5F5', 'purple'),
]

y_start = 0.76
for i, (title, items, color, edge) in enumerate(categories):
    x = 0.01 + (i % 2) * 0.50
    y = y_start - (i // 2) * 0.40
    
    # Category box
    cat_box = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor=color, edgecolor=edge, linewidth=1.5)
    ax.text(x + 0.22, y, title, transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', va='top',
            fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', bbox=cat_box)
    
    for j, item in enumerate(items):
        ax.text(x + 0.02, y - 0.04 - j * 0.045, f'• {item}',
                transform=ax.transAxes, ha='left', va='top', fontsize=8.5)

# Bottom note
ax.text(0.5, 0.02, 'Curation lead: Consider upgrading CC from GO:0016020 (membrane) to GO:0016021 (integral component of membrane)\n'
        'Key references: PMID:37995686 (ACD6 ion channel), PMID:14507999 (ACD6 defense), PMID:18643991 (ITN1 salt stress)',
        transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, style='italic',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1)
ax.axis('off')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence summary visualization saved.")
